{{CargoRelic
|name=Koryeon Postcard
|class_id=20406
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Demon God in Koryeo, the snail also recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time and post it online to get many likes!
|fame=18
|art=26
|fth=14
|civ=15
|tech=17
|ss1=Koryeon Museum Medal Output +5
|ss2=Koryeon Museum Medal Output +10
|ss3=Koryeon Museum Medal Output +15
|ss4=Koryeon Museum Medal Output +15
|ss7=Koryeon Museum Medal Output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
